data.body:
So Kate Johnson straight-up confirms that Dead Internet Theory is real.

Imagine a house where more than half the time the faucets run, nobody uses the water for anything. Someone takes a 20 minute shower? The shower runs for for another 20 minutes with nobody standing under it. That’s our Internet.

data.body:
I love Jackie.

I don’t love the term ‘color barrier’.

Sounds like a force of nature. Like the sound barrier. A thing that just exists.

But the color barrier was people. White people. Who would harm, prosecute or kill us for participating in life.

Like what society does to trans people now.
